title: Company Names Tribunal decision: Addidas Ltd
body: "Application number 5135  Applicant Adidas AG objected to the name used by Addidas Ltd under the Companies Act 2006.  This decision was undefended. ‘Undefended’ refers to decisions where there has been no defence in response to the application to the Company Names Tribunal.  Signed order  On the 12 May 2025 the adjudicator hereby gives notice under sections 73(4) and (5) of the Companies Act 2006 that the company name of Addidas Ltd is changed to 15908392, Ltd. "
